questionHtml: Hence find the cross-sectional area of the tunnel.
markschemeHtml:
A=32.4 m2                  A2


Note: As per the marking instructions, FT from their integral in part (d)(i). Award at most A1FTA0 if their area is >48, this is outside the constraints of the question (a 6×8 rectangle).


[2 marks]
